title: Forsaken Corpses: 1.21.1 Port
description: Unofficial Minecraft 1.21.1 port of Forsaken Corpses
body: # Forsaken Corpses ![Original Image from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4817bfa183354f6e3b2b130b7a2bf483c90c1413.png) Unofficial Minecraft 1.21.1 port of **Forsaken Corpses**. ## About Forsaken Corpses adds naturally generated skeletal corpses to Minecraft, making caves and dangerous areas feel more atmospheric, abandoned, and hostile. While exploring underground, you may find different corpse variants scattered through caves. These corpses can drop bones when broken, and some may appear with old tools such as iron, gold, or stone pickaxes. In the Nether, some corpses may be more than simple decoration — they can come alive and fight you. ## Features - Naturally generated skeletal corpses in caves - Multiple corpse variants - Corpse blocks can drop bones when broken - Some corpses may appear holding pickaxes - Nether corpses may come alive and attack - Adds more atmosphere to cave exploration - Fabric support for Minecraft 1.21.1 ## Configuration Starting from version 1.0.1, the original mod supports drop configuration. Config file: `config/lying_skeletons_config.properties` ## Requirements - Minecraft 1.21.1 - Fabric Loader - Fabric API ## FAQ - **Q:** Can I include it in my modpack? - **A:** Yes, of course! ### - **Q:** Can I configure the drop? - **A:** Yes, you can starting from version 1.0.1. The config file is located in `config/lying_skeletons_config.properties` ## Environment Client and Server. ## Credits - Original author: **BaconDragon_** - Minecraft 1.21.1 port: **ThBTT** - Original project: Forsaken Corpses ## Notes This is not the original mod upload. It is a 1.21.1 compatibility port made with permission from the original author. P.S The mod name in files/mod ID is "lying skeletons"
